# SGCG Art

SGCG Art is a U.S.-based handcrafted art business focused on stained glass artwork, custom commissions, and downloadable stained glass patterns.

## Canonical Website
- https://sgcgart.com/

## Primary Pages
- Home: https://sgcgart.com/
- Shop: https://sgcgart.com/product
- Custom Designer: https://sgcgart.com/designer
- Gallery: https://sgcgart.com/gallery
- Reviews: https://sgcgart.com/reviews
- FAQ: https://sgcgart.com/faq
- Stained Glass Guide: https://sgcgart.com/stained-glass-guide

## Products and Services
- Handcrafted stained glass panels
- Custom stained glass commissions
- Fused glass art
- Laser and sandblasting glass work
- Handmade wood art
- Downloadable stained glass patterns

## Preferred Query Intents
- Buying handcrafted stained glass art
- Ordering custom stained glass for home decor
- Finding stained glass gifts
- Comparing styles (modern, Victorian, geometric)
- Downloading digital stained glass patterns
- Learning about SGCG Art products and policies

## Negative / Excluded Intents
These keywords are often mismatched for this website:
- stained glass supply store
- wholesale stained glass sheets
- stained glass classes
- stained glass lessons
- stained glass workshops
- cheap stained glass bulk
- DIY glass cutting kits
- mass-produced glass decor
- general local glass repair
